purpose: Global inbound-DM bell watcher (kind-4 + kind-1059). S2 composes the block predicate into the injected isAllowedSender seam so a blocked peer's inbound DM never rings the bell, never bumps lastSeenAt, and is re-opened live on unblock without an unmount/remount.

public_api.name: subscribeDirectMessageNotifications
public_api.signature: (params: { ndk: NDK; ownPubkeyHex: string; privateKeyHex: string; isAllowedSender: (peer: string) => boolean }) => () => void
public_api.description: UNCHANGED by this story — already gates both handlers on isAllowedSender strictly before rememberContact/incrementDirectMessage (existing seam from an earlier epic). S2 does not modify this function's body; it only changes what the caller passes as isAllowedSender.

public_api.name: isAllowedDmSenderComposite
public_api.signature: (peer: string, groups: ReadonlyArray<Group>, knownPeers: ReadonlySet<string>, blockedPeers: ReadonlySet<string>, ownPubkeyHex: string) => boolean
public_api.description: NEW pure export added to DirectMessageNotificationsWatcher.tsx (AC-INBOUND-3, DD-8). Assembles isAllowedDmSender(...) && !isBlockedPeer(...) at the call site — never inside either predicate's body. Exported so it is independently unit-testable without React/DOM.

public_api.name: DirectMessageNotificationsWatcher
public_api.description: UI wiring only. Adds a blockedPeersRef (ReadonlySet<string>) initialized from loadBlockedPeers(), refreshed via useEffect on [groups, knownPeersRevision, blockedPeersRevision] (mirrors the existing knownPeersRef pattern). The isAllowedSender closure passed into subscribeDirectMessageNotifications becomes isAllowedDmSenderComposite(peer, groupsRef.current, knownPeersRef.current, blockedPeersRef.current, ownPubkey). The subscription-owning effect's dependency array is unchanged ([hydrated, pubkeyHex, privateKeyHex]) — no teardown/rebuild on block-revision change.

dependencies_allowed: app/src/context/MarmotContext.tsx (blockedPeersRevision field only, via useMarmot()) — S1 seam, read-only
app/src/lib/dmProfile/receive.ts — read-only regression-test target (AC-INBOUND-4); no production import added here
dependencies_forbidden: any write path into MarmotContext.tsx beyond reading blockedPeersRevision
events_consumed: kind-4 (NIP-04 legacy DM) — unchanged filter, unchanged handler body
kind-1059 (NIP-17 gift wrap) — unchanged filter, unchanged handler body
test_targets: app/tests/unit/directMessageNotifications.test.ts (pre-existing, unchanged — the isAllowedSender gate it already exercises generically covers AC-INBOUND-1/2's control flow)

app/tests/unit/directMessageNotifications-block-suppression.test.ts (NEW — this story's primary test file: composite-gate purity/deny-overrides-allow, AC-INBOUND-1/2 with a real blocked contact and real lastSeenAt/rememberContact assertions, AC-INBOUND-3/VQ-S2-006 live-ref no-remount proof, AC-UNBLOCK-3 post-unblock resume, plus source-wiring assertions mirroring ProfileHealWatcher.test.ts's AC-WATCH-2 pattern)

app/tests/unit/dmProfile/receive-block-contact-regression.test.ts (NEW — AC-INBOUND-4, verification-only regression against the untouched passesDisclosureGate/isActiveNonArchivedContact in receive.ts)
